html:query.declare: <FILTRO f_des="20010101" f_has="20120110" l_emp="1" l_leg="1" l_veh="0" oi_empresa="1"/>

GROUP.noreg: No hay documentación con vencimiento entre las fechas seleccionadas

qry:select.name: QRY_EMPRESAS
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT ORG03_EMPRESAS.oi_empresa, ORG03_EMPRESAS.c_empresa, ORG03_EMPRESAS.d_empresa FROM ORG03_EMPRESAS, CCO01_EMPRESAS_CONT WHERE ORG03_EMPRESAS.oi_empresa = CCO01_EMPRESAS_CONT.oi_empresa {%?($PARAMIN/@oi_empresa!='') {% AND ORG03_EMPRESAS.oi_empresa = {$PARAMIN/@oi_empresa} %} {% %} %} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: QRY_DOC_EMP
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' SELECT CCO01_ATRIB_EMP_CON.f_vencimiento, CCO05_ATRIB_CTROL.d_atributo_ctrol FROM CCO01_ATRIB_EMP_CON, CCO05_ATRIB_CTROL JOIN CCO01_ATRIB_EMP_CON.oi_atributo_ctrol INNER CCO05_ATRIB_CTROL.oi_atributo_ctrol WHERE CCO01_ATRIB_EMP_CON.oi_empresa = {#PARAM:@oi_empresa} AND CCO01_ATRIB_EMP_CON.f_vencimiento >= {DateTime(#PARAMIN:@f_des)} AND CCO01_ATRIB_EMP_CON.f_vencimiento <= {DateTime(#PARAMIN:@f_has)} ORDER BY f_vencimiento ASC ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: QRY_DOC_LEG
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' SELECT PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.e_numero_legajo, PER01_PERSONAL.d_ape_y_nom, CCO02_ATRIB_PER_CON.f_vencimiento, CCO05_ATRIB_CTROL.d_atributo_ctrol FROM CCO02_PER_EMP_CONT, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP, CCO02_ATRIB_PER_CON, CCO05_ATRIB_CTROL, PER01_PERSONAL JOIN CCO02_PER_EMP_CONT.oi_personal_emp INNER PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp, CCO02_PER_EMP_CONT.oi_personal_emp INNER CCO02_ATRIB_PER_CON.oi_personal_emp, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal INNER PER01_PERSONAL.oi_personal, CCO02_ATRIB_PER_CON.oi_atributo_ctrol INNER CCO05_ATRIB_CTROL.oi_atributo_ctrol WHERE PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_empresa = {#PARAM:@oi_empresa} AND CCO02_ATRIB_PER_CON.f_vencimiento >= {DateTime(#PARAMIN:@f_des)} AND CCO02_ATRIB_PER_CON.f_vencimiento <= {DateTime(#PARAMIN:@f_has)} ORDER BY f_vencimiento ASC ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: QRY_DOC_VEH
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' SELECT CCO04_VEHICULOS.c_marca, CCO04_VEHICULOS.d_modelo, CCO04_VEHICULOS.c_dominio, CCO04_ATRIB_VEHIC.f_vencimiento, CCO05_ATRIB_CTROL.d_atributo_ctrol FROM CCO04_VEHICULOS, CCO04_ATRIB_VEHIC, CCO05_ATRIB_CTROL JOIN CCO04_VEHICULOS.oi_vehiculo INNER CCO04_ATRIB_VEHIC.oi_vehiculo, CCO04_ATRIB_VEHIC.oi_atributo_ctrol INNER CCO05_ATRIB_CTROL.oi_atributo_ctrol WHERE CCO04_VEHICULOS.oi_empresa = {#PARAM:@oi_empresa} AND CCO04_ATRIB_VEHIC.f_vencimiento >= {DateTime(#PARAMIN:@f_des)} AND CCO04_ATRIB_VEHIC.f_vencimiento <= {DateTime(#PARAMIN:@f_has)} ORDER BY f_vencimiento ASC ')/ROWS/ROW
